document.title: MI97-05515A ASSY COVER-GF_REAR
document.documentType: Part approval package including part specification, part list, process quality control plan, packing specification, work instruction, inspection standard, inspection report, and recycling declaration

sourceSummary.oneLine: Approval and quality documentation for MI97-05515A ASSY COVER-GF_REAR used in the GF Detector.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Used as supplier/manufacturing approval evidence for part specification, BOM, process controls, packaging, work standard, inspection criteria, inspection results, RoHS applicability, and packaging recycling self-declaration.
keyPoints: Material code and SEC part number are MI97-05515A for ASSY COVER-GF_REAR.
Model is GF Detector and vendor/manufacture code is DAEJIN INJECTION & MOLD / DB51.
Revision history records a change from MI41-01834A to MI41-01834B for the FPC-2G Detector LED Indicator.
Initial inspection report lists RoHS as applicable and records 5 EA inspected, 5 EA accepted, 0 EA defective.
Packaging recycling self-declaration states PE white main body, label unused, self-judged grade 우수, while the attached grading sheet lists final grade 어려움.
